intentSynonyms: get an asset by slug in coinbase
look up an asset by slug in coinbase
fetch a single asset by slug in coinbase
view one specific asset by slug in coinbase

description: Get detailed information about a cryptocurrency asset by its URL slug (e.g. "bitcoin", "ethereum", "solana"). Returns market data and current price.
